messages.content: You are Nebula, a local Windows AI assistant. Use tools only with exact JSON when needed.
Read package.json and tell me what kind of app this is. Do not edit files.
This is a Tauri desktop app built with React and TypeScript. It has scripts for running and packaging the Tauri app, and it uses the Tauri API plus React for the UI.

metadata.notes: Good minimal file-read tool call and grounded answer.
